The '''Tatooine Bureau of Ethnicity and Socialization''' was an adjunct of the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony that was operating on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in the [[600 BBY/Legends|sixth century BBY]]. Among those who worked for the bureau was [[Alkhara/Legends|Alkhara]], who studied the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] as an [[Sentientologist|anthropologist]], who allied with them for a short time before later betraying them and establishing his own criminal group.

Even hundreds of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after Alkhara's terror reign had ended, the Bureau still had to deal with small pockets of Alkhara's followers who still believed in the anarchy that Alkhara had preached. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the Bureau hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to finally eliminate the remaining pockets of Alkhara's followers and erase all memory of him.
